results.title: Honeywell Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Results, With Adjusted Sales and Adjusted Earnings Above High End of Guidance; Issues 2026 Outlook
results.snippet: Honeywell reported fourth quarter 2025 results with adjusted sales and adjusted earnings above the high end of guidance. The company issued its 2026 outlook with expected adjusted earnings per share of $10.35 to $10.65.

results.title: Honeywell 4Q25 Earnings Release
results.snippet: This earnings release details Honeywell's fourth quarter 2025 results showing adjusted sales and adjusted earnings above expectations. It also provides the company's 2026 outlook.

results.title: Honeywell 4Q25 Earnings Presentation
results.snippet: The Q4 2025 earnings presentation highlights strong finish to 2025 with adjusted sales and EPS above guidance along with 23% orders growth. It outlines progress on portfolio transformation and the planned Aerospace separation.

results.title: Honeywell Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Results, With Adjusted Sales and Adjusted Earnings Above High End of Guidance; Issues 2026 Outlook
results.snippet: Fourth quarter sales were $9.8 billion, up 6%, with adjusted sales of $10.1 billion up 11% organically. The release provides full details on GAAP and adjusted earnings per share.

results.title: Quarterly Results | Honeywell International Inc.
results.snippet: Honeywell's investor page provides access to Q4 2025 earnings materials including the webcast replay, press release, and presentation slides. It archives quarterly financial reports for 2025 and prior years.

results.title: Honeywell Announces Launch of Honeywell Aerospace’s Offering of Senior Notes in Connection With Planned Spin-Off
results.snippet: Honeywell announced that its Aerospace unit commenced a private offering of up to $16 billion in senior notes ahead of its planned spin-off, expected to complete in the third quarter of 2026.

results.title: Honeywell Announces Filing of Form 10 Registration Statement for Planned Spin-Off of Honeywell Aerospace
results.snippet: Honeywell filed a Form 10 registration statement with the SEC for the spin-off of its Aerospace business, which will trade on Nasdaq as HONA and become independent in Q3 2026.

results.title: Honeywell takes next step in aerospace spinoff, offers ...
results.snippet: Honeywell filed a Form 10 for spinning off its aerospace division, which is set to become a publicly traded company under the ticker HONA in the third quarter of 2026.

results.title: Honeywell Stock: Why Its Aerospace Spin Could Be Hiding Its True Value in 2026
results.snippet: Honeywell is separating its aerospace business in 2026, a move analysts believe could unlock significant value as the market has not yet priced the two resulting pure-play companies accurately.

results.title: About Our Spin-Offs | Honeywell International Inc.
results.snippet: Honeywell is preparing to spin off its Aerospace business in 2026 following a portfolio review, creating two independent companies focused on aerospace and automation technologies.

results.title: Honeywell Stock: Why Its Aerospace Spin Could Be Hiding Its True Value in 2026
results.snippet: Honeywell stock trades at 22x 2026 earnings and appears undervalued ahead of its aerospace spin-off creating two pure-play companies. Analysts give it a mean price target of $252 with 15 buy/outperform ratings.

results.title: Honeywell (HON) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions ...
results.snippet: 13 analysts assign Honeywell (HON) a consensus Buy rating with a 2026 price target of $252.23. The forecast reflects current market conditions as of April 2026.

results.title: Honeywell International (HON) Stock Forecast & Price Target
results.snippet: 22 analysts project an average 12-month price target of $251.83 for Honeywell International, implying about 7.4% upside with a range from $205 to $296.

results.title: Is Honeywell International (HON) Pricing In Its Strong Multi ...
results.snippet: DCF analysis estimates Honeywell's intrinsic value at $174 per share, suggesting the stock is overvalued by 42.5% at recent prices near $248. The company scores 2 out of 6 on undervaluation metrics.

results.title: Here's Why You Should Retain Honeywell Stock in Your ...
results.snippet: The analysis recommends holding Honeywell stock and references strong earnings surprises in the industrial sector along with positive consensus estimates for 2026.
